results.title: Fe-S Cluster Cu Displacement (Geochemical Cu-Fe Replacement Series)
results.novelty_search_result: Macomber 2009 + ISCA 2023 establish Cu→Fe-S displacement in biology. Geochemical pyrite→chalcopyrite framing and CIA/LIAS differential rescue prediction are novel. Zero publications at intersection.
results.verdict_reason: Highest groundedness (8/8 verified). Biology established by two independent groups. 29-order Ksp irrefutable. CIA/LIAS test cleanly falsifiable. Geochemical framing genuinely novel.

results.title: FDX1 Redox Potential Tuned to Vent Cu2+/Cu+ Boundary
results.novelty_search_result: Zero papers apply Pourbaix/Eh-pH speciation to cuproptosis or intracellular Cu. Absolute novelty confirmed by PubMed and web search.
results.verdict_reason: Highest novelty (9/10). True geochemistry→biology tool transfer. All grounded claims verified. Core prediction (ligand-extended boundary) is speculative but testable. ETC inhibitor test confounded — needs redesign.

results.title: H2S-CuS Nanoparticle Feed-Forward Loop
results.novelty_search_result: No endogenous CuS formation in cuproptotic mitochondria proposed. External CuS nanoparticle delivery studied in tumor therapy but different mechanism.
results.verdict_reason: Novel prediction but Cu atom count challenge serious. Self-terminating loop unresolved. Biphasic prediction distinguishing. Needs reframe as amorphous deposits.

results.title: Dithiolane-Chalcopyrite Ligand Homology
results.novelty_search_result: No explicit dithiolane-vent thiol Cu comparison. But dithiolane Cu binding is known coordination chemistry.
results.verdict_reason: KD misattributed (Smirnova 2018, not Tsvetkov 2022; log K 16.1 not 17). Gap narrows from 3-5 to ~2 orders. Molecular fossil unfalsifiable. Borderline pass on ITC panel merit.

results.title: Evolutionary FDX1-LIAS Reconstruction
results.novelty_search_result: No Cu-gradient selection pressure hypothesis at alkaline vents published.
results.verdict_reason: Phylogenomics tractable. Cu gradient hypothesis novel. Protocell experiment infeasible. Fe-S biogenesis as primary FDX1 function more parsimonious.

results.title: CuS-H2O2 Fenton-Analog Radical Cycle
results.novelty_search_result: CuS-Fenton extensively characterized in environmental remediation (2014-2025). Only mitochondrial localization claim is marginally novel.
results.verdict_reason: Novelty failure (CuS-Fenton well-known). H2O2 concentration gap 4-6 orders. ETC self-termination contradiction. Inherits H1.3 Cu atom count problem. Below quality threshold.

meta_validation: 1 PASS, 4 CONDITIONAL_PASS, 1 FAIL. 17% QG kill rate. All [GROUNDED] claims verified via web search. One citation error detected: H1.1 KD misattributed to Tsvetkov 2022 (actual source: Smirnova 2018). H1.6 failed on novelty (established environmental chemistry) + quantitative impossibility (H2O2 gap) + internal contradiction (self-terminating loop). Verdict distribution appropriate.
